steps.title: Read off the y-intercept
steps.content: $f(0)$ is the $y$-value of the graph when $x=0$ — i.e. the y-intercept. Look at where the line crosses the $y$-axis.

steps.title: Match the value
steps.content:
The graph crosses the $y$-axis at $y=-6$, so $f(0)=-6$.

That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
